commands.review_summary:
Composes channel/custom `beforeDeliver` with `reply_payload_sending` and `message_sending` in the plain and buffered auto-reply dispatchers, with regression tests.

PR surface: Source -4, Tests +66. Total +62 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main deterministically skips `message_sending` when `dispatcherOptions.beforeDeliver` is present. I did not run a live Telegram repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed for the real-proof gate and linked-issue scope; there is no narrow ClawSweeper code repair to queue from this review.

target.title: fix(auto-reply): preserve message sending hooks
target.body:
## Summary

- Compose channel/custom `beforeDeliver` hooks with both `reply_payload_sending` and `message_sending` in the shared dispatcher paths.
- Keeps the existing order explicit: channel/custom transform first, reply payload hooks second, message-sending guard/rewrite/cancel hook last.
- Adds regression coverage for both plain and buffered dispatchers when a channel supplies `beforeDeliver`.

Fixes #92374

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: channel/custom `beforeDeliver` previously bypassed documented `message_sending` plugin hooks on agent reply delivery, so safety/rewrite/cancel hooks did not run.

Real environment tested: local source checkout with Vitest and changed-gate checks. No live Telegram account was used; this PR verifies the shared dispatcher paths that Telegram calls.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `CI=true npm exec -- pnpm test src/auto-reply/dispatch.test.ts`; `CI=true npm exec -- pnpm test extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-native-commands.session-meta.test.ts`; `CI=true npm exec --package corepack -- corepack pnpm check:changed`; `CI=true npm exec -- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/dispatch.ts src/auto-reply/dispatch.test.ts`; `git diff --check`.

Evidence after fix: `src/auto-reply/dispatch.test.ts` now asserts that custom `beforeDeliver` delivery invokes `reply_payload_sending` and then `message_sending` for both plain and buffered dispatcher entry points.

Observed result after fix: the targeted dispatcher suite passes with 20/20 tests, the Telegram adjacent suites pass with 143/143 tests, and `check:changed` exits 0 for core/coreTests lanes.

What was not tested: live Telegram delivery and the separate preview-finalized path mentioned in the issue were not live-tested in this PR.

## Verification

- RED: `CI=true npm exec -- pnpm test src/auto-reply/dispatch.test.ts` failed with two assertions showing `runMessageSending` was called 0 times for custom `beforeDeliver` paths.
- `CI=true npm exec -- pnpm test src/auto-reply/dispatch.test.ts`
- `CI=true npm exec -- pnpm test extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-native-commands.session-meta.test.ts`
- `CI=true npm exec -- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/dispatch.ts src/auto-reply/dispatch.test.ts`
- `CI=true npm exec --package corepack -- corepack pnpm check:changed`
- `git diff --check`

## Existing PRs

Searched open PRs for `message_sending beforeDeliver reply_payload_sending`; no duplicate fix PR found.
